title: EU Cloud vs US Giants: A New European Cloud Option? #shorts
summary: The video discusses expansion of major cloud provider data centers in Europe and raises the question of whether the EU should develop its own cloud infrastructure to achieve digital sovereignty and reduce reliance on US-based providers.
writeup: This short examines whether the EU should build its own cloud infrastructure rather than rely on US-based providers, even as those providers expand their European data centers. The stakes are digital sovereignty: reducing dependency on foreign-controlled cloud platforms. The takeaway is that expanding local data centers does not by itself resolve the sovereignty question, which turns on who owns and controls the underlying infrastructure.
